name: testAddCompanyWithSameName
description: Error is displayed when trying to create a company with an already existing name
descriptionHtml: Error is displayed when trying to create a company with an already existing name
statusMessage:
Locator expected to contain text: Company with name {CompanyName} already exists. Received: Call log: - Locator.expect with timeout 5000ms - waiting for locator("[role='alert']") 7 × locator resolved to
…
- unexpected value "ERRORwebsite doesn’t qualify for the URL syntax Invalid customerDetails.country: ''. The country code must be a valid 2-letter code as defined by ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 Invalid companyAddress.city: ''. It must contain only alphabetic characters and spaces Invalid companyAddress.zip: ''. It must contain between 2 and 10 characters"

steps.name: Click on 'System administration' menu in Header

Verify: error message is displayed for duplicate company name
